read: cadence beta > 0 with hhi ~ 0 = Brown-MacKay commitment funds the gap; hhi beta > 0 with cadence ~ 0 = loyal/pinned flow funds it; both = mixed
claim_boundary: Cadence measured on an ~11-day window (coarse classes); demand HHI is a proxy for pinned share, not a measurement of it; non-tied segment only.
